title: Better Amethyst
body:
# Better Amethyst — Complete Feature List

## Items

### Amethyst Dust
- **What it is:** Crafted from amethyst shards via Smithing. Stackable.
- **Behavior:** Edible — eat it for Speed II (30s), Strength II (25s), Glowing (30s).
- **Recipe:** Smithing template (amethyst shard) + 1 amethyst shard base + 1 amethyst shard addition → 3 amethyst dust.

### Amethyst Carrot
- **What it is:** Edible food item.
- **Behavior:** Hunger 6, saturation 0.8 (slightly better than a steak).
- **Recipe:** Shaped 3×3 — center is a vanilla carrot, surrounded by 8 amethyst dust → 9 amethyst carrots.

### Refined Amethyst Crystal
- **What it is:** Single-stack tool item.
- **Behavior:** Right-click to dash **5 blocks forward** in your look direction. Blends prior velocity with the dash so it feels natural during sprinting/falling. Up-look adds extra lift. 3-second cooldown. Plays ender-teleport sound.
- **Recipe:** Shaped pattern of gold ingots and amethyst dust.

### Vibration Detector
- **What it is:** Single-stack tool item.
- **Behavior:** While **holding + sneaking**, applies Glowing to every living entity in a 25-block radius.
- **Recipe:** Shaped with echo shards + amethyst dust.

### Amethyst Mirror
- **What it is:** Single-stack tool item with NBT-backed entity link.
- **Behavior:**
  - **Right-click while looking at a mob:** Links to that mob.
  - **Right-click while linked:** Swaps positions with the linked entity (up to 50 blocks apart).
  - **Shift+right-click while linked:** Toggles **spectate-through-eyes mode** — your camera switches to the linked entity's view. You stay frozen in place at your saved spot. Shift+right-click again to return.
 
- **Recipe:** Shaped with diamonds, iron ingots, and amethyst dust.

### Crystalline Anchor
- **What it is:** Single-stack tool item, shatters when used.
- **Behavior:** Two-stage save/restore.
  - **First right-click (Set):** Saves your position, yaw/pitch, HP, hunger, saturation, and active status effects into NBT.
  - **Second right-click (Restore):** Teleports you back to the saved position, restores HP/hunger/saturation, re-applies all saved status effects. 
- **Consumes anchor on use.**
- **Recipe:** Shaped with amethyst dust, ender pearls, amethyst shard.

### Amethyst Lantern (formerly "Soul Harvester")
- **What it is:** Single-stack tool item with NBT-stored captured mob data.
- **Behavior:**
  - **Right-click in air:** Harvests every mob in a 10-block radius of the same entity type as the first one captured. Stores full mob NBT (so when released, the mob keeps its name, HP, effects, custom data). Caps at **10 souls**.
  - **Players caught in the harvest zone:** Applied **Soulless** status effect for 60 seconds (instead of being captured).
  - **Mobs with > 150 HP**: The lantern shatters (you're guaranteed to survive at ≥ 2 HP).
  - **Right-click block:** Release one captured soul at the block face.
  - **Sneak + right-click block:** Release all souls at once.
- **Recipe:** Shaped — netherite block surrounding amethyst dust.

### Amethyst Gauntlet (formerly "Sonic Gauntlet")
- **What it is:** Single-stack combat item.
- **Behavior:** Right-click fires a 40-block beam.
  - Hits the first valid entity in the beam path for **15~ sonic-boom damage** (armor-bypassing) + 1.5-strength knockback.
  - **3.5-second cooldown.**
- **Recipe:** Shaped 3×3 — vibration detectors + music disc 5 + amethyst dust + gold ingots + netherite scrap.

---

## Enchantments


### Resonance (weapon, max level III)
- **Effect:** On hit, releases a shockwave around the target.
- **Source:** Simple Dungeon chests (35%) and the enchanting table.

### Crystallize (weapon, max level III)
- **Effect:** On hit, applies Slowness `(level - 1)` and Mining Fatigue `(level - 1)` for `3 × level` seconds.
- **Source:** Simple Dungeon chests (35%) and the enchanting table.

### Echo Strike (weapon, max level II)
- **Effect:** Hits echo half a second later.
- **Source:** Ancient City chests (40%) and the enchanting table.

### Amethyst Ward (chestplate, max level I)
- **Effect:** When a hit would kill you, instead set HP to 1 and trigger a knockback-only explosion around you. **The chestplate breaks** (decremented to 0). One-shot save. Doesn't trigger from void or `/kill`.
- **Source:** Stronghold Library chests (30%) and the enchanting table.

### Vibration Cloak (leggings, max level I)
- **Effect:** Masks every vibration you produce — sculk sensors, calibrated sculk sensors, and the Warden's hearing all ignore you. Works at all times (not just sneaking).
- **Source:** Ancient City chests (40%) and the enchanting table.

### Reflective Shell (chestplate, max level III)
- **Effect:** `15% × level` chance to reflect incoming projectiles back at their owner.
- **Source:** Stronghold Library chests (30%) and the enchanting table.


---

## Status Effects

### Echo (beneficial)
- **Effect:** Your attacks echo — every hit deals an extra delayed strike 1 second later.
- **Source:** Echo Potion.

### Shatter (harmful)
- **Effect:** When you take damage, every armor piece on you takes **5× normal durability damage**.
- **Source:** Shatter Potion.

### Soulless (harmful)
- **Effect:** Reduces max HP by 10 (5 hearts) and slows movement by 30%. Visible in the HUD effects panel. Lasts 60 seconds.
- **Source:** Standing in the Amethyst Lantern's harvest zone when activated (cant be caused to self).

---

## Potions 

### Potion of Echo
- **Effect:** 45 seconds of Echo.
- **Brewing:** Awkward Potion + Echo Shard → Potion of Echo. 

### Potion of Shatter
- **Effect:** 20 seconds of Shatter.
- **Brewing:** Awkward Potion + Iron Ingot → Potion of Shatter. 

---

##  Loot Table


| Chest | Books | Roll chance |
|---|---|---|
| Simple Dungeon | Resonance | 35% |
| Simple Dungeon | Crystallize | 35% |
| Ancient City | Echo Strike | 40% |
| Ancient City | Vibration Cloak | 40% |
| Stronghold Library | Amethyst Ward | 30% |
| Stronghold Library | Reflective Shell | 30% |
